name: Sausage Kolaches - Klobasnicky
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the warm water, sugar, yeast, 1 cup of warm milk, and 1 3/4 cups of flour. Let it stand for 1 hour.
2. Add Crisco, 1/4 cup of warm milk, salt, egg yolks, and 2 1/4 cups of flour to the mixture. Beat well until a dough forms.
3. Allow the dough to rise until it doubles in size.
4. Roll out the dough and divide into portions for each sausage roll.
5. Place a piece of sausage inside each portion of dough, then cover with more dough.
6. Butter the tops of the rolls.
7. Let them rise again and bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit (200 degrees Celsius) until golden brown, about 15 minutes.
8. After baking, brush the sausages with melted butter.
Note: Cook the sausage first, then slice it into desired lengths.
